car.darbDesc: Darb toll charges if crossing to Abu Dhabi
car.testimonial1Text: Booked the Patrol for a weekend trip to Abu Dhabi. Car was clean, fuel was full, and they delivered it to my hotel in Dubai Marina. No fuss, no hidden charges. Exactly what I needed.
car.testimonial2Text: Honestly? Best rental experience in Dubai. I've tried 4-5 companies before and always had some issue or the other. This time the car was waiting when I landed. Will use again 100%
car.testimonial3Text: Was skeptical about renting a luxury car online but the process was smooth. WhatsApp booking, crypto payment, car delivered next morning. Unbelievable service bhai!
car.faqQ1: What documents do I need to rent a car?
car.faqA1: You need a valid driver's license issued in your name, a passport or Emirates ID, and a security deposit. International visitors may need an International Driving Permit (IDP).
car.faqQ2: Is insurance included in the rental price?
car.faqA2: Yes, full comprehensive insurance is included with every rental at no extra cost. You can upgrade to Premium Comprehensive Insurance (PCI) for zero liability coverage.
car.faqQ3: What is the minimum age to rent a luxury car?
car.faqA3: The minimum age is 25 years for most vehicles. Select vehicles may be available for drivers aged 21 and above with additional documentation.
car.faqA4: Yes! We accept Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), USDT and other major cryptocurrencies. Instant confirmation with zero hidden fees.
car.faqQ5: Is delivery included? Where do you deliver?
car.faqA5: Yes, free delivery is included anywhere in Dubai — hotels, residences, airports. We coordinate with you for a convenient time.
car.faqQ6: Can I drive to Abu Dhabi or other Emirates?
car.faqA6: Yes, you can drive anywhere in the UAE. However, driving outside the UAE borders is strictly prohibited.
car.faqA7: Cars are delivered with a full tank of fuel. Please return the car with the same level of fuel to avoid refueling charges.
car.faqQ8: What happens if I return the car late?
car.faqA8: A grace period of 1 hour is provided. Late returns beyond the grace period may incur additional charges as per the rental agreement.

homeSections.latestOffers: Latest Car Rental Offers In Dubai
homeSections.offersPara1: Looking for luxury cars at pocket-friendly prices in Dubai? We make every drive feel special with our premium fleet, starting from as low as AED 500/day. From premium music systems and GPS navigation to safety features like airbags, electric windows, and ABS — there's plenty to choose from.
homeSections.offersPara2: Our luxury fleet has satisfied customers time and again. Whether it's your honeymoon, a special date night, wedding day, or family trip — we customize our services accordingly. With unwavering support and the option of a professional driver if needed, every journey feels exclusive.
homeSections.offersPara3: We have no restrictions on rental timings and provide all necessary documentation to ensure a smooth experience. Our fleet goes beyond the most prominent names — explore options from Nissan, Chevrolet, Toyota, and more affordable luxury sedans.
homeSections.bestLuxuryTitle: Best Luxury Car Rental in Dubai
homeSections.luxuryPara1: Dubai is the city of luxury, and nothing matches the thrill of exploring it from behind the wheel of a premium car. Whether you are heading to the beaches, cruising through downtown, or taking in the scenic views, our luxury fleet has the perfect ride for every occasion. We keep the process simple so you can book and enjoy your day without any hassle.
homeSections.luxuryPara2: Our team pays close attention to every detail you share, offering flexible pick-up and drop options that work for you. Every car in our fleet is regularly maintained, thoroughly cleaned, and fully insured. So whether it is a business trip or a casual drive, you can enjoy complete peace of mind on the road.
homeSections.luxuryPara3: We offer flexible packages at affordable prices, and you can customize services based on your preferences. Need a driver? Our staff is professionally trained, police-verified, and brings years of smooth driving experience. So sit back, relax, and enjoy the ride without any worries.
homeSections.sportsPara1: Remember those sports car posters on your wall growing up? That dream is still alive, and Dubai is the perfect place to make it real. Whether you are celebrating a special occasion or just want to treat yourself, turning dreams into reality has never been easier. We have been helping customers drive their dream cars for years.
homeSections.sportsPara2: From Ferrari and Porsche to McLaren and Lamborghini, our sports collection is built for speed and style. Drive the latest models and experience Dubai like never before. No restrictions, no limits — just you and the open road in a machine that turns heads wherever you go.
homeSections.sportsPara3: Take your sports car to the dunes, cruise along Sheikh Zayed Road, or park up at Dubai Marina — every drive becomes a moment worth capturing. So why wait? Experience the thrill of a luxury sports car at budget-friendly prices and make every ride unforgettable.
homeSections.suvPara1: Planning a road trip with family, friends, or your partner? Nothing beats the comfort, space, and luxury of a premium SUV. From Land Rovers to Mercedes, our SUV collection gives you the versatility you need for longer journeys across Dubai and beyond.
homeSections.suvPara2: Choose from 7-seater and 8-seater luxury SUVs equipped with premium sound systems, touchscreen infotainment, adjustable leather seats, and baby seat options. They are ideal for long drives, night-outs, mountain trips, camping, or picnics. Plus, with 24/7 roadside assistance and plenty of luggage space, you are covered for any adventure.
homeSections.suvPara3: Whether you need a confident ride for business meetings or a spacious SUV for weekend getaways, we have the perfect match for you. Browse our collection, pick your favourite, and hit the road in style.
homeSections.rentStepsTitle: Rent a Car in 3 Easy Steps
homeSections.step1Desc: Browse 350+ luxury, sports & exotic cars in our Dubai fleet. Filter by brand, type, or budget to find your perfect match.
homeSections.step2Desc: Select your rental duration and pickup location. We offer free doorstep delivery across all Dubai locations.
homeSections.step3Desc: Get behind the wheel with full insurance, 24/7 roadside assistance, and zero deposit options on selected vehicles.
homeSections.whatYouNeed: What You Need to Rent a Car in Dubai
homeSections.requirementsDesc: Whether you are visiting or living in Dubai, here's everything you need to hit the road.
homeSections.docNote: Documents may vary. Contact us for the most up-to-date requirements.
homeSections.termsDesc: Clear and straightforward rental terms so you can drive with confidence. No hidden fees, no surprises.
homeSections.whyChooseIntro: Amidst plenty of car rental services in Dubai, finding one that is reliable, transparent, and truly luxurious can be overwhelming. Here is what makes us the trusted choice for tourists, residents, and businesses across Dubai.
homeSections.reason1Desc: From Lamborghini to Rolls Royce — the largest fleet of luxury, sports & SUV cars in Dubai. Multiple units of each model ensure availability.
homeSections.reason2Desc: We deliver to your hotel, villa, or any location across Dubai — including Palm Jumeirah, Downtown, Marina & Airport.
homeSections.reason3Desc: Police-verified, experienced drivers available on request. Perfect for airport transfers, events & business meetings.
homeSections.reason4Desc: Rent selected luxury cars without any security deposit. Easy booking, zero hassle, instant confirmation.
homeSections.reason5Desc: 200+ verified 5-star reviews from tourists and residents. Rated 4.9 on Google — see what our customers say.
homeSections.reason6Desc: Flexible daily, weekly & monthly rentals. Add extras like baby seats, GPS, or decorations — tailored to your needs.
homeSections.faqQ1: How much does it cost to rent a Lamborghini in Dubai?
homeSections.faqA1: Lamborghini rental in Dubai starts from AED 2,240/day for a Lamborghini Urus and goes up to AED 2,920/day for a Lamborghini Huracan EVO Spyder. Prices vary by model, season, and rental duration.
homeSections.faqQ2: Can I rent a luxury car in Dubai with a foreign license?
homeSections.faqA2: Yes, tourists can rent luxury cars in Dubai with their home country driving license along with an International Driving Permit (IDP). UAE residents must have a valid UAE driving license.
homeSections.faqQ3: What is the best luxury car rental company in Dubai?
homeSections.faqA3: We are rated 4.9 on Google with 200+ verified 5-star reviews. We offer 350+ premium vehicles, free Dubai-wide delivery, 24/7 support, and no deposit options on selected cars.
homeSections.faqQ4: Do I need insurance to rent a luxury car in Dubai?
homeSections.faqA4: No need to arrange separate insurance. All our rentals include full comprehensive insurance coverage, so you are protected in case of accidents or damages.
homeSections.faqQ5: Can tourists rent a car in Dubai?
homeSections.faqA5: Absolutely. Tourists can rent luxury cars in Dubai with a valid passport, visit visa, home country driving license, and International Driving Permit (IDP). Delivery is available to any hotel or location.
homeSections.faqQ6: What is the minimum age to rent a luxury car in Dubai?
homeSections.faqA6: The minimum age is 21 years for most luxury cars and 25 years for exotic & sports cars. A valid driving license with at least 1 year of experience is required.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Dubai's Premier
about.description: VIP Luxury Car Rental Dubai has been providing exceptional luxury car rental services in Dubai, offering a curated fleet of 350+ premium sports cars, luxury SUVs, and exotic vehicles. Our commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction sets us apart.
about.storyP1: Founded in Dubai, VIP Luxury Car Rental was born from a passion for luxury automobiles and a vision to transform the car rental experience. We recognized that Dubai — a city synonymous with luxury and excellence — deserved a car rental service that matched its standards.
about.storyP2: Today, we proudly serve hundreds of satisfied customers, from business executives and celebrities to tourists seeking the ultimate Dubai experience. Our fleet spans 17 premium brands including Lamborghini, Ferrari, Rolls Royce, Bentley, and more.
about.storyP3: Every vehicle in our collection is hand-picked, meticulously maintained, and delivered with the highest level of service. We don't just rent cars — we create experiences.
about.valueQualityDesc: Every car in our fleet is meticulously maintained to the highest standards. No dents, no damages — just perfection.
about.valueCustomerDesc: Your satisfaction is our priority. From booking to return, we ensure a seamless luxury experience.
about.valueAvailabilityDesc: Round-the-clock customer support and roadside assistance. We're always here when you need us.
about.valueDeliveryDesc: Complimentary doorstep delivery and pickup across all Dubai locations. No hidden fees.
about.ctaDesc: Browse our collection of 350+ luxury vehicles and book your dream car today.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about renting a luxury car in Dubai.
faq.q1: What documents do I need to rent a luxury car in Dubai?
faq.a1: Tourists need a valid passport, visit visa, home country driving license, and an International Driving Permit (IDP). UAE residents need a valid UAE driving license and Emirates ID. Additional documents may be required depending on the vehicle.
faq.q2: What is the minimum age to rent a car?
faq.a2: The minimum age is 25 years for most vehicles. Select vehicles may be available for drivers aged 21 and above with additional documentation and deposit requirements.
faq.q3: Do you offer free delivery in Dubai?
faq.a3: Yes! We offer complimentary doorstep delivery and pickup across all Dubai locations, including hotels, residences, and airports. Our team will coordinate with you for a convenient delivery time.
faq.q4: What insurance is included in the rental?
faq.a4: All rentals include Main Comprehensive Insurance (MCI). For complete peace of mind, you can upgrade to Premium Comprehensive Insurance (PCI) at 30% of the basic rental fee, which covers you with zero liability in case of accidents.
faq.a5: A security deposit is required and varies by vehicle. We also offer a No Deposit option on select vehicles. The deposit is held for 30 days after return to cover any traffic violations or road tolls.
faq.a6: Most rentals include 300 km per day, 2,100 km per week, and 5,000 km per month. Additional kilometers are charged as per the contract terms. Unlimited mileage options may be available on request.
faq.q7: Can I drive outside Dubai or the UAE?
faq.a7: Driving outside the territorial borders of the UAE is strictly prohibited. Vehicles must be driven within Dubai and the UAE only. Violation may result in penalties including AED 50,000 fine.
faq.q8: What happens if the car breaks down?
faq.a8: We provide 24/7 roadside assistance. If you experience any issues, simply call our support team, and we will assist you immediately. In case of major issues, a replacement vehicle will be arranged.
faq.q9: Can I modify or cancel my booking?
faq.a9: Modifications are subject to availability and must be made at least 24 hours in advance. Cancellations made 24+ hours before pickup are fully refundable. Cancellations within 24 hours may incur a one-day charge.
faq.a10: Yes, we provide professional chauffeur services upon request. Our drivers are licensed, experienced, and fully vetted to ensure a safe and comfortable experience.
faq.q11: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a11: We accept credit/debit cards, bank transfers, and cash. All online payments are processed securely. We do not store your payment card details.
faq.q12: How do I book a car?
faq.a12: Booking is easy! Browse our collection on our website, select your preferred vehicle, choose your rental dates, and submit your booking. You can also call or WhatsApp us at +971 50 156 4849 for assistance.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDesc: Privacy Policy for VIP Luxury Car Rental Dubai. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.s1p1: At VIP Luxury Car Rental Dubai, accessible from vipluxurycarrental.com, protecting your privacy is one of our core commitments. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and what choices you have regarding your data.
privacy.s1p2: This policy applies exclusively to our online activities and covers information shared or collected through our website. It does not apply to offline data collection or third-party channels.
privacy.s1p3: By using our website, you consent to the practices described in this policy. If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to reach out to our team.
privacy.s2p1: We collect information in several ways to provide and improve our car rental services:
privacy.s2list1: ["Name, email address, and phone number when making a booking","Driver's license details and identification documents","Payment information required to process your reservation","Messages, attachments, and other content you send us through contact forms or email","Any additional information you choose to share with our team"]
privacy.s2list2: ["IP address and browser type","Pages you visit and how you interact with our website","Date and time of your visit","Referring website addresses","Device information for optimal website display"]
privacy.s3p1: The information we collect helps us deliver a seamless luxury car rental experience. Here's how we use it:
privacy.s3items: ["Process and confirm your car rental bookings","Communicate with you about your reservations","Improve and personalize your browsing experience","Send booking confirmations and updates","Process payments securely","Detect and prevent fraudulent activity","Analyze website usage to enhance our services","Comply with legal obligations in the UAE"]
privacy.s4p1: VIP Luxury Car Rental Dubai follows standard industry practices for log file management. Like most websites, our hosting servers automatically record certain information when you visit, including:
privacy.s4list: ["Internet Protocol (IP) addresses","Browser type and version","Internet Service Provider (ISP)","Date and time stamps","Referring and exit pages","Click patterns and page interactions"]
privacy.s4p2: This data is not linked to any personally identifiable information. We use it to analyze trends, administer the site, track user movement, and gather demographic insights — all to improve your experience.
privacy.s5p1: Like most websites, we use cookies to enhance your browsing experience. Cookies are small text files stored on your device that help us:
privacy.s5list: ["Remember your preferences and settings","Understand which pages you find most useful","Optimize our website based on your browsing patterns","Provide relevant content and offers"]
privacy.s5p2: You can choose to disable cookies through your browser settings. However, please note that some features of our website may not function properly as a result.
privacy.s6p1: For our users in the European Economic Area (EEA), you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.s6rights: ["Right to Access: Request copies of your personal data we hold. A small fee may apply.","Right to Rectification: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete information.","Right to Erasure: Request deletion of your personal data under certain conditions.","Right to Restrict Processing: Request limitation on how we use your data under certain conditions.","Right to Object: Object to our processing of your personal data under certain conditions.","Right to Data Portability: Request transfer of your data to another organization or directly to you."]
privacy.s6p2: We will respond to any request within one month. To exercise any of these rights, please contact us using the details below.
privacy.s7p1: We take the protection of children's privacy seriously. Our services are not directed at individuals under the age of 13.
privacy.s7p2: VIP Luxury Car Rental Dubai does not knowingly collect personal identifiable information from children under 13. If you believe your child has provided us with personal data, please contact us immediately. We will make every effort to promptly remove such information from our records.
privacy.s8p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements. When we make updates:
privacy.s8list: ["We will post the revised policy on this page","The \"Last updated\" date at the top will reflect the most recent changes","For significant changes, we may notify you via email or a notice on our website"]
privacy.s8p2: We encourage you to review this page periodically to stay informed about how we are protecting your information.
privacy.s9p1: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please reach out to us:
privacy.s9address: Al Barsha, Near Mall of Emirates, Dubai, UAE

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.metaDesc: Terms and Conditions for VIP Luxury Car Rental Dubai. Please read these terms carefully before renting a vehicle.
terms.s1p1: Welcome to VIP Luxury Car Rental Dubai. By accessing our website and using our rental services, you agree to these Terms & Conditions. Please read them carefully before making a booking.
terms.s1p2: Throughout this document, "we", "us", and "our" refer to VIP Luxury Car Rental Dubai. "You" and "your" refer to the customer or renter. These terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and VIP Luxury Car Rental Dubai.
terms.s1warning: ⚠️ Please Note: If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you should not use our website or services.
terms.s1p3: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting on this page. It is your responsibility to review these terms periodically.
terms.s2p1: All bookings must be made through our official website, via phone, or through authorized third-party platforms. A valid driver's license and identification are required at the time of booking.
terms.s2list1: ["Full payment is required at the time of booking for standard reservations","We accept credit/debit cards, bank transfers, and cryptocurrency","All prices are in UAE Dirham (AED) unless stated otherwise","A security deposit is required and will be pre-authorized on your card"]
terms.s2p2: Prices are guaranteed at the time of booking. Any applicable taxes (5% VAT) and fees will be added to the total amount. We strive to offer the most competitive rates in Dubai.
terms.s3p1: Our cancellation policy varies depending on the type of booking. Please review the specific terms applicable to your reservation:
terms.s3list1: ["Free cancellation up to 48 hours before the scheduled pickup time","50% refund for cancellations between 24-48 hours before pickup","No refund for cancellations within 24 hours of pickup","No-shows will be charged the full rental amount"]
terms.s3list2: ["Free cancellation up to 72 hours before pickup","50% refund for cancellations between 48-72 hours","No refund for cancellations within 48 hours"]
terms.s4list: ["Vehicles must be returned on the date and time specified in the rental agreement","A grace period of 1 hour is provided for late returns","Beyond the grace period, an additional day's rental will be charged","Early returns do not qualify for a refund of unused days"]
terms.s5items: ["Renter must be at least 25 years of age with a valid driver's license","All drivers must present a valid passport or Emirates ID at pickup","Smoking is strictly prohibited in all vehicles. A fine of AED 1,000 will be charged","Pets are not allowed in the vehicles unless explicitly permitted","Vehicles must not be used for illegal activities, racing, or subleasing","The renter is responsible for all traffic violations and fines during the rental period","Off-road driving is strictly prohibited unless the vehicle is specifically designed for it","Any modification to the vehicle or tampering with the GPS tracker is prohibited","Fuel policy: Cars are delivered with a full tank and must be returned with a full tank","Our fleet consists of 350+ premium sports cars, luxury SUVs, and exotic vehicles"]
terms.s6p1: Driving outside the territorial borders of the United Arab Emirates is strictly prohibited. All vehicles must remain within UAE territory during the rental period.
terms.s6warning: ⚠️ Violating this restriction will result in a minimum fine of AED 50,000 and possible legal action. GPS tracking is active on all vehicles.
terms.s7p1: Most rentals include a specified kilometer allowance. Standard limits are 300 km per day. Additional kilometers are charged according to the vehicle class. Unlimited mileage options may be available for select vehicles upon request.
terms.s8list1: ["Main Comprehensive Insurance (MCI) is included with all rentals","Premium Comprehensive Insurance (PCI) can be purchased for zero liability","PCI costs 30% of the basic rental fee"]
terms.s8list2: ["Damage to tires, windscreen, undercarriage, and interior are not covered by insurance","Damage caused by off-road driving is not covered","The renter is responsible for towing charges in case of breakdown or accident","Loss of keys or remote will incur a replacement fee","Any damage must be reported immediately; failure to do so may result in full liability"]
terms.s9items: ["The Tax Is 5% — Applied to all rentals as per UAE law","Salik — Dubai Gates Crossing Fees","Darb — Abu Dhabi Gates Crossing Fees","Additional Driver — AED 100 per day per additional driver","Delivery/Collection outside standard areas may incur a fee","Young driver fee may apply for drivers under 25 years"]
terms.s10p1: If you have any questions about these Terms & Conditions, please reach out to us:
terms.s10address: Al Barsha, Near Mall of Emirates, Dubai, UAE
